name: Construction injury in Farmington—OSHA fine help my case?

mainEntity.name: Construction injury in Farmington—OSHA fine help my case?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, citations prove negligence, strong evidence for third-party claim.** Separate from civil[3]. **Key factors:** 1. UOSH enforces in Utah. 2. Admissible in court. 3. Reportable incidents trigger. 4. Not against you. Request copies. Lawyer uses to pressure settlement.
